scripts.build: ng build admin && ng build storefront && ng build booking && ng build editor && ng build overlays && ng build kb
scripts.deploy:admin: ng build admin && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.admin.jsonc
scripts.deploy:storefront: ng build storefront && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.storefront.jsonc
scripts.deploy:booking: ng build booking && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.booking.jsonc
scripts.deploy:editor: ng build editor && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.editor.jsonc
scripts.deploy:overlays: ng build overlays && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.overlays.jsonc
scripts.deploy:kb: ng build kb && wrangler deploy -c wrangler.kb.jsonc
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:admin && npm run deploy:storefront && npm run deploy:booking && npm run deploy:editor && npm run deploy:overlays && npm run deploy:kb
